discrepancy_analysis:
A. QUESTION INTERPRETATION: Supp Fig 4c shows a 2x2 contingency matrix comparing methylation-based clustering (rows: MPNST-G1, MPNST-G2) to transcriptome-based clustering (columns: MPNST-G1, MPNST-G2) in the combined cohort (Toronto + TCGA + DKFZ), n=17 samples, ARI=0.76, p<0.001. The concordant MPNST-G2 samples is the G2-methylation x G2-transcriptome diagonal cell.

B. REPORTED VALUE FROM PAPER: The Supp Fig 4c matrix reads:
  [G1 meth / G1 transc = 8]   [G1 meth / G2 transc = 1]
  [G2 meth / G1 transc = 0]   [G2 meth / G2 transc = 8]
Sum = 8+1+0+8 = 17 (matches n=17 shown in figure caption). Concordant MPNST-G2 = 8.

C. MODEL VALUE: 6 with rationale 'RNA-seq availability limit'. Based on data inspection of MOESM4 (Supp Data 1), the Toronto cohort has 8 MPNST-G2 methylation samples total, of which 7 have RNA-Seq available (M9450 lacks RNA-Seq). MPNST-G1 methylation has 8 total with 6 RNA-Seq available (M3398 and M6712 lack RNA-Seq). The model appears to have conflated the MPNST-G1 RNA-Seq count (6) with the MPNST-G2 concordant count, OR restricted analysis to Toronto-only rather than the combined cohort shown in Supp Fig 4c.

D. DISCREPANCY MAGNITUDE: |8 - 6| / 8 = 25% relative difference. Exceeds 10% threshold -> DISCREPANT.

E. ROOT CAUSE: The model restricted the cohort to Toronto samples with RNA-Seq availability and/or confused G1 vs G2 counts. The paper's Supp Fig 4c (ARI=0.76) uses the COMBINED cohort (Toronto + TCGA + DKFZ validation), n=17, not just Toronto (which would be Supp Fig 4a with ARI=0.81). The value 6 corresponds to Toronto MPNST-G1 RNA-Seq availability, not G2 concordance in combined cohort.

F. CORRECT VALUE: 8 concordant MPNST-G2 samples (G2 by both methylation and transcriptome clustering) in the combined cohort, n=17.

G. CLASSIFICATION: Cohort filter difference - model used a stricter (Toronto-only RNA-Seq) cohort rather than the combined (Toronto+TCGA+DKFZ) cohort shown in Supp Fig 4c.
proposed_fix: Include the combined cohort (Toronto + TCGA + DKFZ validation samples with RNA-Seq data) rather than restricting to Toronto-only. Supp Fig 4c shows the combined cohort (n=17) with ARI=0.76. The G2-methylation x G2-transcriptome diagonal cell contains 8 concordant samples, not 6. The value 6 corresponds to Toronto MPNST-G1 samples with RNA-Seq availability, which is not the quantity requested.
